nasb.text: There is no remembrance of earlier things; And also of the later things which will occur, There will be for them no remembrance Among those who will come later still.

esv.text: There is no remembrance of former things, nor will there be any remembrance of later things yet to be among those who come after.

cnv.text: 以前的事，無人記念； 將來的事，後來的人也不追憶。

ccb.text: 过去的事无人记得， 将来的事后人也不记得。

csbs.text: 先前曾有的，无人记念； 以后要来的，其后的人也不记念。
